heading: Acceptance of membership
label: 290i Acceptance of membership
text: The President is hereby authorized to accept membership for the United States in the African Development Bank (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “Bank”) provided for by the agreement establishing the Bank (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “agreement”) deposited in the archives of the United Nations.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this part”, meaning part 3 of subtitle B of title XIII of , , , known as the African Development Bank Act, which enacted this subchapter and amended sections 262d, 262f, and 276c–2 of this title and , Banks and Banking. For complete classification of part 3 to the Code, see Short Title note set out below and Tables.Pub. L. 97–3595 Stat. 741section 24 of Title 12Aug. 13, 1981
